The university whose teams with a mascot called Stomper began competing in the Northern Sun Intercollegiate Conference in 2008 is **Minnesota State University, Mankato**. 

This is evidenced by the context stating: "Minnesota State began competition in the NSIC in 2008-09, due to the dissolution of the North Central Conference." The Minnesota State Mavericks, which are the athletic teams of Minnesota State University, Mankato, began competing in the NSIC in 2008-09.
